texto: The wheel of life: one generation rises like summer wheat, then withers and falls to seed. The wheel turns - birth, youth, adulthood, parenthood, senescence, death - driven by genetic machinery set in motion so many eons ago. For all its subtleties and infinite beauty, life has but one purpose: to keep the wheel turning.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Frank Vertosick Jr.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “The wheel of life: one generation rises like summer wheat, then withers and falls to seed. The wh…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, death, imagery pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e imagery.
